attempted_route: pandas positional-column fallback (col 0=syllogism, col 1=prediction) for model CSVs + importlib rule-module broad callable search + ccobra as dead-code fallback gated by USE_CSV_SCORING=bool(model_pred_lookup)
observation: exit_code=0 but Combinations found: 1 — all 139 participants assigned Atmosphere;atmosphere; positional CSV columns loaded junk data, ccobra path never executed; eval=False
rationale: Positional fallback (col 0, col 1) silently loaded wrong data from model CSVs making model_pred_lookup non-empty, so USE_CSV_SCORING stayed True and ccobra was never reached. All scores collapsed to zero ties, resolved alphabetically to one combo.
recommended_alternative: Print df.columns and df.head(2) for each model CSV at startup to identify true schema, then map columns explicitly. If ccobra is used, remove the USE_CSV_SCORING gate so it always runs; use ccobra.syllogistic.encode_task() to convert raw task strings rather than hand-rolling figure detection.
